title: Rosemary
writer: Erich Kuby, Rolf Thiele, Rolf Ulrich
actors: Nadja Tiller, Peter van Eyck, Carl Raddatz
plot: West Germany in '50s is becoming an economic superpower. In such climate, Rosemarie is just one of many enterpreneurs who wants her piece of new fortune. She uses her charms to bring members of West German industrial elite to her ...
